title: Register: informal vs neutral
subtitle: Choose tone for the situation.
overview: Use neutral polite language with strangers and services.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: Can you give me a hand? informal

items.en: How’s it going? Do you feel like having something to drink?

items.es: Buenos días, quisiera hacer una consulta.
items.en: Good morning, I would like to make an inquiry.
Can you give me a hand with this?
Could you help me with this reservation?

items.es: La misma idea cambia mucho según el tono.
items.en: The same idea changes a lot depending on the tone.
